headline: American Water Works (AWK) Stock Could Be 8% Undervalued On Its Acquisition Narrative
summary: American Water Works Company (AWK) continues to attract attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 9% over the past year but modestly higher over the past month. See our latest analysis for American Water Works Company. For American Water Works Company, the recent 1 day share price return of 0.27% and 7 day share price decline of 0.98% sit within a wider pattern where the 90 day share price return is down 7.89% and the 1 year total shareholder return is down 9.12%...
